commit_scope: Add a bounded scalar autodiff gradient cell floor.

commands: coord claim autodiff-gradient-cell-floor "Next model-kernel wall after PR #3160: add bounded autodiff gradient cell receipt for scalar affine loss; avoid Adam, live mesh transport, durable eval query, payload merkle proof, privacy/conflict, router/audio, and BML compiler lanes."
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/model-vitality.fk form-stdlib/optimizer-step.fk form-stdlib/autodiff-gradient.fk form-stdlib/tests/autodiff-gradient-cell-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Focused validate returned `core.fk+model-vitality.fk+optimizer-step.fk+autodiff-gradient.fk+autodiff-gradient-cell-band.fk -> 4095` with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The fourth-arm gate returned `PASS-4WAY  autodiff-gradient-cell`. Wellness reported no attention items and production aligned with origin/main.

ci_validation.notes: No push or PR yet for this lane.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested; this is a local Form runtime floor.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form-native model kernels now have bounded scalar affine gradient cells for prediction, squared loss, dw/db, and optimizer-step handoff.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/model-vitality.fk form-stdlib/optimizer-step.fk form-stdlib/autodiff-gradient.fk form-stdlib/tests/autodiff-gradient-cell-band.fk

phase_gate.gate: A scalar gradient cell must exist before tensor-scale autodiff or Adam optimizer cells can be claimed as first-class Form-native model-kernel status.
phase_gate.next: Add tensor autodiff gradient cells, Adam optimizer cells, live chunk payload merkle proof, mesh transport, durable eval query, and privacy/conflict receipts as separate bounded lanes.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Fixed-point SGD/momentum optimizer-step receipts existed, while autodiff gradient cells remained a named next wall.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: autodiff-gradient-cell returns 4095 four-way and is admitted to form/fourth-arm-bands.txt.
not_claimed: chunk-range payload merkle proof over a live carrier
